task_completion.description: Agent opens a terminal and begins constructing the Screaming Frog CLI command.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window is visible with the command 'screamingfrogseospider' typed at the prompt.

task_completion.description: Agent includes the required headless mode and target URL flags in the command.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CLI command includes '--headless' and '--crawl https://quotes.toscrape.com/'.

task_completion.description: Agent includes the required export tab and output directory flags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CLI command includes '--export-tabs' (or similar) specifying 'Internal:All' and '--output-folder' specifying '~/Documents/SEO/cli_results/' or '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/cli_results'.

task_completion.description: The CLI command is executed and shows active crawling progress or completion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output shows Screaming Frog logs, such as crawl progress percentages, 'Crawling', or 'Crawl finished' messages.

task_completion.description: The requested 'Internal:All' report is successfully exported to the target directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (like 'ls ~/Documents/SEO/cli_results/') or a file manager window shows the generated CSV file (e.g., internal_all.csv) inside the /home/ga/Documents/SEO/cli_results/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent must use the CLI in headless mode, not the graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog SEO Spider graphical user interface (GUI) should NOT be open or visible in any screenshot.

integrity.description: The agent must actually run the tool, not fake the terminal output or file creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal history should not show the use of 'echo', 'touch', or 'cp' commands to manually create the output CSV file or fake the crawl logs.

integrity.description: The output file must be generated by the software, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit, or VS Code) should be open showing the contents of the output CSV file being manually entered.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL is https://quotes.toscrape.com/. The target output directory is /home/ga/Documents/SEO/cli_results (or ~/Documents/SEO/cli_results). The task requires using the Screaming Frog CLI (screamingfrogseospider) with headless flags. A successful crawl will generate a CSV file for the 'Internal:All' tab containing at least 10 rows of data (the actual site has ~100+ internal URLs). Screaming Frog SEO Spider version is 23.2.
